top_findings.summary: The skill requests access to iMessage for 2FA authentication handling, which is unrelated to its core video editing functionality. While authentication to Kapwing is necessary for the service, accessing SMS/iMessage data constitutes unnecessary data collection for a video editing tool. 2FA verification should be handled through user prompts or standard authentication flows rather than accessing personal messaging data.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests access to iMessage for 2FA authentication handling, which is unrelated to its core video editing functionality. While authentication to Kapwing is necessary for the service, accessing SMS/iMessage data constitutes unnecessary data collection for a video editing tool. 2FA verification should be handled through user prompts or standard authentication flows rather than accessing personal messaging data.
